form.formComment: Last start finished 2nd on April 10 over 295m at this track behind Beau View Alfie beaten 2.75 lengths (17.46) in a Class 1. Expected to go close this company.

form.formComment: Solid performance to win by a nose at Ascot Park over 390m (22.93) beating Bobby The Fox in Class 1 on April 8. Has never missed the frame from four starts out of this draw. Looks the one to beat again.

form.formComment: Placed last time (17.39) at this track in a Class 1, finishing third and beaten 6 lengths. Goes very well off the draw boasting two wins and two places from five starts. Consistent performer who is a great chance to score.

form.formComment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and tends to spot them a start in his races, The latest effort was a 7 length fourth over 457m at Ascot Park. Not keen this time.
